title: Genotyping the ADAMTS5-J (Deltagen) mouse strain
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"35het","text":"ADAMTS5, the main aggrecanase, is a protein that seems to play a functional role in the development of brown and white adipose tissue (WAT) and browning of WAT. These observations were made using the ADAMTS5-P mice originally generated by Pfizer, in collaboration with Lexicon Genetics (The Woodlands, TX, USA). ADAMTS5-J mice were generated by Deltagen Inc. and are now commercially available through The Jackson Laboratory (Bar Harbor, USA). The targeting construct, containing an IRES-lacZ-neomycin cassette, substituted 134 nucleotides of exon 2. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"66i5p","text":"-Tails digested in lysis buffer containing proteinase K can be stored at -20°C before continuing the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Cut a very small piece of the ear

Collect them in an labeled eppendorf tube filled with 800 µl lysis buffer supplemented with 8µl 10 mg/ml proteinase K solution* Lysis buffer (1L):-40 ml 5M NaCl (0.2 M)-20 ml 10% SDS (0.02%)-100 ml 1M Tris HCl pH 8 (0.1 M)-10 ml 0.5M EDTA (5 mM)-830 ml ultra-pure (MilliQ) water*10 mg /ml Proteinase K solution: dissolve 100 mg in 5 ml MilliQ water and 5 ml 100% ethanol. Proteinase K 100 mg Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #3115879001
Centrifuge samples for 10 min at 13000 rpm at room temperature.
Transfer the supernatants with DNA in tubes filled with 600 µl isopropanol. Leave until all tubes are transferred.
Mix one tube slowly at a time by inversion, DNA fibers will appear in the tube.
Collect DNA fibers with pipette tips (put your finger on the end of the tip to avoid as much as possible that liquid enters in the tip)

Transfer pipette tips in new labeled tubes containing 200 µl TE buffer (allow rehydration of DNA to occur during 15 min before removing the tips) *TE buffer (1L):-10 ml 1 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 (10 mM)-2 ml 0.5 M EDTA (1 mM)-988 ml MilliQ water-autoclave
Incubate 1-2 hours at 55°C and vortex to dissolve the DNA. If genotyping is postponed, store samples at -20°C, otherwise proceed.

Prepare samples by combining PCR beads with 1µl of forward primer 5’-GGG CCA GCT CAT TCC TCC CAC TAC T-3’ recognizing the neo cassette (10 µM work concentration; 400 nM final concentration), 2µl of forward primer 5’-GCA TAC CAC TCC AAA CTT AGA GAG G-3’ recognizing the endogenous ADAMTS5 DNA sequence (10 µM work concentration; 800 nM final concentration), 2µl of reverse primer 5’-CGC AGC TGA CTG CTC TTG TGC TTG-3’ recognizing the endogenous ADAMTS5 DNA sequence (10 µM work concentration; 800 nM final concentration), 19µl MilliQ water and 1µl DNA. Include negative control (no DNA). Include DNA samples of a previous genotyped ADAMTS5-J wild-type (WT), heterozygous (HE) and homozygous (knockout, KO) animal as positive controles. Illustra PuReTaq Ready-To-Go PCR Beads GE Healthcare Catalog #27-9557-02
Put PCR samples in 2720 Thermal Cycler (Applied Biosystems).
Cycling conditions are:-95°C 2 min-28 cycles of 95°C 30 sec; 60°C 30 sec; 72°C 30 sec-72°C 5 min.

Pour a 2% (= 2g/100 ml) agarose gel in 1x TAE buffer and immerse gel in 0.5x TAE supplemented with Midori Green Advanced DNA Stain (5µl/100 ml buffer)* 50x TAE (1L):-242g Tris base-57.1 ml glacial acetic acid-100 ml 500 mM EDTA pH 8.0 (50 mM)-Add MilliQ water until 800 ml-Stir-Bring final volume to 1L with MilliQ water-Autoclave*1x TAE (1L):-20 ml 50x TAE-980 ml MilliQ water-Contains 40 mM Tris, 20 mM glacial acetic acid and 1 mM EDTA.*0.5x TAE (1L):-10 ml 50x TAE-990 ml MilliQ waterContains 20 mM Tris, 10 mM glacial acetic acid and 0.5 mM EDTA. Molecular Biology Grade Agarose Contributed by users Catalog #EP-0010-05 Midori Green Advanced DNA stain Contributed by users Catalog #NG MG04
Prepare samples: add 5µl Orange DNA loading dye to 25µl PCR mix. Orange DNA loading dye Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #R0631
Load samples (18µl) together with 18µl TriDye 100 bp DNA ladder. TriDye 100 bp DNA Ladder - 125 gel lanes New England Biolabs Catalog #N3271S
Run samples for 40 min with 135V on a Mupid-One electrophoresis System (Eurogentec SA).
Image gel using the Biorad Molecular Imager Gel Doc XR+ Image System, take picture and digitally save the image.
Identify ADAMTS5 WT samples as samples exhibiting a single band of 271 bp, ADAMTS5 KO samples as samples showing a single band of 424 bp, while the ADAMTS5 HE samples show both bands.
creator: Bianca Hemmeryckx
